en.metaTitle: How to Respond to an ATO Information Request
en.metaDescription: A sample article outlining the first practical steps to take when the ATO asks for information or documents.
en.title: How to respond to an ATO information request
en.excerpt: A sample ATO-support article showing how content can be filtered by date and automatically published from a single file.
en.intro: ATO correspondence usually feels urgent, but the first priority is not speed alone. It is understanding exactly what has been requested, by when, and what records are actually relevant.

sections.title: Read the request carefully before gathering everything
paragraphs: Clients sometimes react by sending every available record. That can create more confusion instead of less. A better first step is to confirm the period, issue, and specific documents being requested.
That short review usually helps separate relevant records from background material.

sections.title: Build a response file with structure
paragraphs: A response becomes easier to manage when documents are grouped logically and named clearly. This is especially helpful where multiple accounts, entities, or tax periods are involved.
Structure also helps reduce the chance of overlooking a deadline or providing incomplete information.
bullets: Keep the ATO letter with the response file
Group documents by issue or period
Track deadlines in one visible place

sections.title: Ask for help early if the issue is not straightforward
paragraphs: When the issue involves multiple transactions, older records, or unclear tax treatment, early support can reduce avoidable stress.
Even where the matter is still at an early review stage, a more organised response can change the whole experience.

takeawayItems: Confirm exactly what the ATO is asking for
Escalate early when the issue is complex

cn.metaTitle: 收到 ATO 资料要求后，应该怎么开始处理
cn.metaDescription: 一篇示例文章，说明当 ATO 要求提供资料时，第一步该如何更稳妥地回应。
cn.title: 收到 ATO 资料要求后，应该怎么开始处理
cn.excerpt: 这是一篇 ATO 协助方向的示例文章，用来展示文章如何自动发布并按日期筛选。
cn.intro: 收到 ATO 来信时，很多人第一反应是赶快回复。但真正更重要的第一步，是先弄清楚 ATO 具体要什么、截止日期是什么，以及哪些资料才真正相关。

sections.title: 先读清楚要求，再开始整理资料
paragraphs: 有些客户会本能地把所有能找到的文件都发出去，但这样反而可能让重点更模糊。更稳妥的起点，是先确认涉及哪个期间、哪个问题，以及具体被要求提供哪些文件。
这个小步骤通常就能帮助你把真正相关的资料和背景资料分开。

sections.title: 把回应资料整理成清楚的结构
paragraphs: 如果文件能按问题、期间或实体分类，并且命名清楚，后续回应会容易很多。尤其当涉及多个账户、实体或税年时，结构更重要。
资料结构清楚，也更不容易漏掉时间点或提交不完整内容。
bullets: 把 ATO 来信和回应资料放在同一个文件夹
按问题或期间分组整理文件
把截止日期放在显眼位置追踪

sections.title: 如果问题不简单，尽早寻求协助
paragraphs: 当问题牵涉多笔交易、较早年份资料，或税务处理本身不够清楚时，越早获得支持越能减少不必要的紧张。
即使还只是初步审阅阶段，更有条理的回应方式也会让整个过程轻松很多。

cn.takeawayTitle: 初步回应可先抓住的重点
takeawayItems: 先确认 ATO 具体要求什么
整理好结构再提交资料
复杂问题尽早升级处理
